name: Move dispatchSessionCompletedEvent out of routes/sessions.ts into the service layer (G1/G5)
description: Defined routes/sessions.ts:1596-1673, called :1295/:1430/:1478. Business logic in a route handler violates G1/G5. Approved cut: host in services/session/session-filing-dispatch.ts (already imports inngest, safeSend, session-crud, FILING_CONFIG — every dep; exact peer of the sibling auto-file dispatch). sessions.ts is a cutover-adjacent hotspot — coordinate PR timing; the move does not touch identity-gating.
acceptanceCriteria: dispatchSessionCompletedEvent moved from apps/api/src/routes/sessions.ts to apps/api/src/services/session/session-filing-dispatch.ts (peer of dispatchClosePathAutoFileIfEligible); routes/sessions.ts imports it at the 3 call sites (:1295/:1430/:1478) instead of defining it; eslint G1/G5 route/service-boundary clean; api tests green; no behavior change.
